g.title: SoccerBowlingRound
g.text: C = Completion, S = Success, F = Failure, T = Timer transition

g.title: ab_announce_missing_ball
g.text: Say("I could not find the soccer ball after a full circle")

g.title: ab_announce_pickup_failed
g.text: Say("I could not drive in and touch the soccer ball")

g.title: ab_announce_verify_failed
g.text: Say("I touched the soccer ball but did not secure it")

g.title: sh_announce_no_ball
g.text: Say("I am not holding the soccer ball")

g.title: sh_announce_missing_tag
g.text: Say("I could not find AprilTag 0 after a full circle")

g.title: sh_announce_aim_failed
g.text: Say("I could not aim at AprilTag 0")

g.title: sh_announce_kick_failed
g.text: Say("I could not kick the ball")
